sections.title: Organize notes clearly
sections.text: Create notes and sort them into tabs so ideas, tasks, and thoughts stay separated.

sections.title: Write fast and find things again
sections.text: Edit titles and content, use search, and jump straight back into your recent notes.

sections.title: Voice, reading, and focus
sections.text: Dictate new content, have notes read aloud, and work in focus mode with fewer distractions.

sections.title: Customizable and expandable
sections.text: Adjust colors, markers, font size, and accessibility settings. Pro, Ultimate, Lifetime, or coins increase your limits.
